issues.description: Missing FlipLife action. Card text states 'You may add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand' which must be modeled as FlipLife action before PowerBoost.
Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but text says 'until the start of your next turn'. This should be 'DuringYourTurn' (lasts through opponent's turn and ends at start of your next turn).
Card says 'You may' indicating optional effect, but DSL does not capture optionality. This is a minor notation issue but functionally the effect should proceed as written.
